name: plan_trip
description: Extract structured trip context from natural language queries using the 9-dimension progressive planning model. Use this to convert a user's travel request into structured data covering destination, dates, duration, travelers, budget, interests, accommodation, transport, and constraints. For exporting the final itinerary to maps, use export_gmaps instead.

query.description: Natural language trip description (e.g., '2 weeks in Japan for a couple, mid-range budget, food and temples')

name: export_gmaps
description: Export a structured itinerary JSON to shareable Google Maps URLs and optionally KML files. Use this when you have a completed itinerary with daily activities and locations. For generating the itinerary from natural language, use plan_trip first.

itinerary_file.description: Path to the itinerary JSON file containing days with locations (each day has 'day' number and 'locations' array with name/lat/lng)

export_kml.description: Whether to also export a KML file for Google Earth/Maps import
